title: berkheya umbellata
intro: Berkheya umbellata, also known as the African daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Berkheya umbellata include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Berkheya umbellata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
